scripts.build:play-assets: mkdir -p site/play/quests && for q in Banket_eng Badday_eng Pizza_eng Borzukhan_eng Ski_eng Election_eng Robots_eng Leonardo_eng Depth_eng Edelweiss_eng Ministry_eng Foncers_eng Driver_eng Codebox_eng Pilot_eng Disk_eng Sortirovka1_eng Shashki_eng Player_eng; do gzip -c quests/sr_2_1_2121_eng/$q.qm > site/play/quests/$q.qm.gz; done
